title: Wither Bone Meal
description: This mod adds a new item called "Wither Bone Meal". It can be used on nether wart to grow it. To get it, you need "Wither Bone". It drops from wither skeletons.
body: This mod adds a new item called "Wither Bone Meal". It can be used on nether wart to grow it. To get it, you need "Wither Bone". It drops from wither skeletons.
